name.zhCN: 无障碍与包容性可视化

summary.original: Make data visualizations accessible and inclusive. Use when the user needs chart or diagram accessibility guidance, text alternatives for complex visuals, color and contrast review, keyboard support, reduced-motion behavior for animation or parallax, or an accessibility QA workflow for exported figures, UML-like diagrams, and dashboards.
summary.zhCN: 让数据可视化具备无障碍性与包容性。当用户需要图表或图示的无障碍指导、复杂视觉内容的文本替代方案、颜色与对比度审查、键盘支持、动画或视差的减少动态行为，或针对导出图形、类 UML 图示及仪表板的无障碍质量保证工作流时，请使用此技能。

description.original: Make data visualizations accessible and inclusive. Use when the user needs chart or diagram accessibility guidance, text alternatives for complex visuals, color and contrast review, keyboard support, reduced-motion behavior for animation or parallax, or an accessibility QA workflow for exported figures, UML-like diagrams, and dashboards. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 让数据可视化具备无障碍性与包容性。当用户需要图表或图示的无障碍指导、复杂视觉内容的文本替代方案、颜色与对比度审查、键盘支持、动画或视差的减少动态行为，或针对导出图形、类 UML 图示及仪表板的无障碍质量保证工作流时，请使用此技能。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，支持章节导航、全文检索和沙箱化源文档呈现；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA 6cef595762177aa3aa1364037a9d417da824ae6d.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/build-web-data-visualization/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备特定任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据范围明确的用户目标和上下文，对固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后生成 Agent 提示、检查清单或参考资料包，且不执行上游脚本。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整的官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中执行关键词搜索，并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并一次查看一个章节。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation reviewed against the pinned original SKILL.md; code blocks, commands, paths, links, and technical terms are preserved.

features: 无障碍可视化任务 with two skill-specific task examples
图表、受众与合规约束 and bounded private context input
无障碍审查包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 无障碍可视化任务 input
图表、受众与合规约束 panel
无障碍审查包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization; result=passed
skill-accessibility-and-inclusive-visualization: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
